# Plan Required

## Goal

Describe the purpose of this change.

Example:

- Add new functionality
- Fix a bug
- Improve security controls
- Enhance automation workflows
- Update infrastructure or compliance validation

---

## Scope

List the files, folders, services, workflows, or infrastructure affected.

Example:

- .github/workflows/
- agents/
- infra/
- src/
- compliance/
- tests/

---

## Implementation Steps

Describe the work completed.

1.
2.
3.

---

## Security Impact

Select all that apply.

- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Security controls modified
- [ ] New dependency added
- [ ] Infrastructure changes included
- [ ] Terraform changes included
- [ ] Compliance controls affected
- [ ] STIG validation affected
- [ ] GitHub Actions workflow modified
- [ ] Secrets or environment variables updated

---

## Testing Performed

Select all completed validation activities.

- [ ] Unit tests executed
- [ ] Workflow validation completed
- [ ] Terraform validation completed
- [ ] Security review completed
- [ ] Compliance validation completed
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Required checks pass
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Security controls validated
- [ ] Scope matches the request
- [ ] Documentation updated if required

---

## Rollback Plan

Describe how this change can be reverted if necessary.

Example:

- Revert pull request
- Restore previous workflow version
- Redeploy previous release
- Restore previous Terraform configuration

---

Provide supporting evidence.

### Workflow Runs

- GitHub Actions:
- AI Review:

- STIG Remediation Report

Select all that apply.

- [ ] STIG controls reviewed

## Review Checklist

### Author Checklist

- [ ] Plan reviewed
- [ ] Scope verified
- [ ] Security impact reviewed
- [ ] Testing completed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Rollback plan documented

### Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] Security review completed
- [ ] Required checks passed
- [ ] Required approvals completed
- [ ] Ready for merge

## Additional Notes

Include any additional information, risks, assumptions, lessons learned, or operational considerations.
